narrative:
Precinct Rush Township D (precinct in Scioto County) has 242 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
